entry.title: Batch number missing in LOIPRO Idoc under E1AFPOL

Thanks and Regards,

Kumaran

entry.title: Re: 2H 2024 - VRP-13823 - Refresh Employee History by Emp...

entry.title: Re: The maximum number of data columns allowed in a report (60) has been reached
entry.content: Thanks, current as work around we can use Data Analyzer until 2024.QRC3 (2024.14). Please refer the KB note: https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3523565

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content:
Hello @richaknotts79,

The main delivery for Secure Act 2.0 Section 109 is note 3470796 (BEN: SECURE 2.0 Act - Section 109). So, this is the note you should implement on your system to have this solution available.

Also, I recommend you to apply the side effect notes 3533930 (BEN: "Employee birthdate not found" error when running payroll with 403(b) savings plan) and 3511561 (BEN: Secure Act 2.0 - Section 109 not correctly considering employees who reach 63 years) which have already been delivered.

Kind Regards,
Carlos

entry.title: RHEL 8.10 UPGRADE REQUIRED PROCESS
entry.content:
Current version:

 

Our current Solution manager Prod system is on RHEL 7.9 and HANA 2.0 SPS03

 

Requirement: Unix Team is asking to upgrade OS to RHEL 8.10

 

Query:

 

For upgrading OS to RHEL 8.10 , which option we need to follow:

  1. upgrade HANA database first to HANA 2.0 SPS05 then upgrade RHEL to 8.10 and finally upgrade HANA 2.0 SPS07
  2. Upgrade RHEL to 8.10 and directly upgrading HANA from SPS03 to SPS07 

 

Kindly check and suggest out of above 2 options, which option we should select.

thank you for help

Magda

entry.title: Unified Joule Setup: Bridging Simplicity and Performance
entry.content:
We strive to make the implementation and setup of Joule simpler every day. This blog explains our unified approach to setting up Joule and provides significant updates to previous methods. Integration has been and remains to be one of the key criteria for customer success.

Many of our customers operate complex system landscapes that require a high level of integration work. This includes the integration of SAP applications and third-party solutions.  To simplify connecting systems, SAP offers services such as SAP Integration Suite that make integration much more convenient and achieve the holistic view required by business users. It is the same vision that we have implemented Joule, our copilot that runs across our cloud business applications and supports any questions irrespective of the system that you are in.

First, let’s look at the fundamentals of Joule, SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP), SAP Build Work Zone, and SAP Cloud Identity Services, and how they work with the Line of Business (LoB) solutions.

SAP BTP Fundamentals:

Let’s start with SAP BTP.  To use Joule across SAP’s various cloud applications, it’s essential to set up some basics within your SAP BTP account.

All SAP BTP services can be found in the SAP Discovery Center. To manage these services and adjust them to your individual scenario, you have the option to create directories and subaccounts. This allows you to achieve your administration tasks at each level and project separation within one SAP BTP account. For user authentication and authorization, we use our SAP Cloud Identity Services, as shown below.

Image 1

If you are new to SAP BTP and not sure how to get started, make sure to check out the SAP BTP onboarding services here and join the upcoming live webinars, watch on-demand webinars, review technical blogs and guides. For additional support, you can schedule a 1:1 call with the team or contact your SAP customer Success Partner for more information.

You may also look at the onboarding blogs:

  • [SAP BTP Onboarding Series] SAP BTP Cockpit - Global Account Technical Overview
  • [SAP BTP Onboarding Series] Account Structure and Decision Making
  • SAP BTP Subaccount Technical Overview
  • SAP BTP Directories – Entitlement and User Management

Joule Fundamentals

Joule revolutionizes how you interact with SAP applications, making every touchpoint count and every task simpler. We are embedding Joule across our cloud enterprise portfolio. It works by sorting through and contextualizing data from multiple systems. Users can ask Joule questions in natural language. In response, Joule delivers answers derived from and grounded in the company’s business data across the SAP applications that they use, and third-party sources (Joule Extensions, watch video here), retaining context.

You can find additional information on Joule on this community page: SAP Business AI Overview

Looking at the technical aspects, Joule is one of the services that run on SAP BTP in a multi-cloud / Cloud Foundry environment (CF).

Joule leverages the SAP Business Technology Platform to simplify complex integration landscapes. To activate or set up the Joule service with your LoB, we use the following services:

- SAP Build Work Zone supports Joule interactions that rely on a navigational pattern. The foundation edition of SAP Build Work Zone is included in the Joule license and provisioned as part of the Joule provisioning process and is used exclusively for Joule.     

- SAP Cloud Identity Service offers Identity Authentication Services (IAS) and Identity Provisioning Services (IPS), so customers can achieve a Consistent Identity lifecycle. SAP Cloud Identity Services tenants are delivered as part of a bundle for SAP cloud solutions such as SAP SuccessFactors, SAP S/4HANA, SAP IBP, Fieldglass, and more. In this bundle, customers are entitled to use one SAP Cloud Identity Services for production, and one test tenant preconfigured to your SAP cloud solutions. Using an existing SAP Cloud Identity Services makes it easy to manage users and reduces the complexity of maintaining multiple tenants.

 

Image 2

 For example, as you can see in the graphic, the test cloud identity services tenant is used for all non-productive systems, and the productive cloud identity services tenant is used for the productive systems. You can refer to SAP Help and the S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition setup page, or review the list of integration scenarios with SAP Cloud Identity Services.

Joule Setup – Unified Approach

As you have seen in the SAP Business AI – Overview Blog, we have one Joule for all our LoB solutions. To add more context, it’s not only that Joule can connect to your systems, but it is also the only copilot that can “talk” with all your productive cloud solutions from SAP.

Image 3

Let us take a simple example: You may start your day by checking your due purchase order approvals, looking for outbound delivery, double-click on warehouse orders in the SAP S/4HANA system, and you also plan to apply for leave while looking at the holiday calendar, or checking your pay slip in your SAP SuccessFactors system. Traditionally, you must navigate to each system to achieve all these tasks. Instead of navigating between the SAP SuccessFactors or SAP S/4HANA, you can now use Joule to do the required task for you within one interface.

The setup of Joule can be expanded to your SAP systems based on your requirements at any time.

To summarize the above discussions, it’s important to understand that Joule Integration is the key to focus, and to achieve Integration SAP Business Technology Platform account models can help with various customer requirements. On the other hand, the SAP Cloud Identity Service tenant manages the user lifecycle with your product portfolios.  With Joule, we want to ensure that we help customers achieve the power of integration across your SAP solutions. This helps users avoid the navigation time from one system to another while looking for information and you can imagine the ease of communication with one co-pilot for all your business needs. In short, as @philipp_herz says - "Joule, The New UI for all AI"

So, let us look at the architectural concepts and the services required to set up Joule as of October 2024.

Image 4

The above architecture shows the communication between multiple systems and the services required to activate Joule. Here you can see that we have LoB solutions such as SAP SuccessFactors, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, SAP IBP, SAP Concur, SAP Fieldglass, and SAP BTP including your subaccounts to activate the necessary services and the SAP Cloud Identity Tenant as the main components.  We need additional services on SAP BTP such as Joule, SAP Build Work Zone, Destinations Services, and Connectivity Services. On the other hand, we have navigation services, content exposure, and content consumption which help Joule to achieve the required tasks.

SAP also introduced a new service for Document Grounding (Retrieval Augmented Generation – RAG). This is one of the most useful capabilities that provides out-of-the-box functionality and integrates with Joule, allowing you to access company-specific resources such as corporate FAQ documents. Joule can retrieve data from your business documents such as HR policies, legal documents, contractual agreements, regional or Country-specific documents, supplier and vendor contracts, and much more. This avoids end user time in looking for information among thousands of corporate documents and reduces interaction with your support teams. As of today, the Document Grounding service supports the integration with Microsoft SharePoint, supporting PDF and MS Word file formats. Find more information here:  Joule – Getting Started with Document Grounding - setup guide.

 Document Grounding is not LoB-solution-specific, so you can activate it for all Joule services and upload the supported documents.

Unified Joule Setup:

                  Now let’s look at how we can unify Joule across your SAP cloud applications. Considering some of the commonly used services and the Joule roadmap below, you can start planning your architectural setup.

Image 5

The setup below describes the details of how you can achieve a unified Joule approach across your SAP cloud solutions. To achieve this type of setup, you will need one SAP BTP subaccount with services such as Joule, SAP Build Work Zone, Cloud Foundry, and Document Grounding services. It’s important to note that it is one SAP Cloud Identity Services connected to all your SAP systems.

Image 6 (case 1)

 

Spoiler

* This is not an architectural representation, it is to explain the concept

* This is based on the current Joule release; it could be changed in the future

* The image illustrates the setup of Joule services with a unified integration approach. A similar approach can be taken for QA / Pre-Prod. It is not required to set up Joule with your Dev systems until custom Joule Skills, development services are introduced by SAP

The above approach Case 1 is our recommended approach to connect your SAP applications with Joule.

Case 2, you may have multiple cloud identity services for various reasons for your SAP systems. In this case, you must ensure that Joule connects to as many systems as possible with one SAP Cloud Identity Service.

Image 6 (case 2)

Note: In the graphic above, Joule runs on two different instances and will only communicate with the integrated LoB solution. Due to different setups, Joule in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, SAP DSC, and other services connected to Joule Subaccount B will not be able to answer SAP SuccessFactors questions and vice versa.

In Case 3, we examine a scenario in which the customer has public and private cloud services and two cloud identity services.

 

Image 7 (case 3)

 If you have both SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition in place, Joule supports only one integration (either SAP S/4HANA Cloud public or private edition) per subaccount as of today. SAP is looking to provide a unified approach for a combination of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition soon.

In case 3, we have different Cloud Identity Services, one for the Public Edition and another for the Private Edition. We will need to create two different SAP BTP subaccounts to activate Joule. In subaccount A, Joule can communicate with both SAP SuccessFactors and SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition. In subaccount B, there will be a dedicated Joule for S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition, whereas both Joule instances may not be able to communicate with each other.

If you have more questions about integrating Joule services using a unified approach, please contact your SAP Account Executive or SAP Customer Success Partners for support.

Joule Availability:

  • We are working on making Joule available in most of the SAP BTP data centers. However, a list of AWS, Microsoft Azure, and Google Cloud Platform data centers where Joule runs can be found here. Data centers include, for example, Australia for the APJ region, Europe with EU and non-EU for EMEA and MENA, and the U.S.  for North America.

While you are planning your activation process, we recommend you check for the nearest data center based on your LoB solutions and the potential Joule business users. Joule does not have pre-defined data center mapping, and this will allow you to activate the integration based on a data center of your choice. You can check the supported data centers globally.  With this approach, you may want to consider

  • If your company approves the Joule data centers that you want to use
  • LoB solution data centers to Joule data center integration
  • Legal consideration in case you do not have a Joule data center locally
  • Consult with your legal department before setting up Joule to check for in-country/regional or other data regulations
  • For SAP BTP subaccount data center selection and latency-related topics, Please refer to our previous blog  SAP Business AI – Overview for all !!!

If you have questions, please feel free to contact your Customer Success Partner or Joule Experts for advice on this topic. 

Important: In the case of the EU access-only, systems and data centers, you should consider a few more details before you plan your setup. To support GDPR compliance with our SAP EU Access offering, you can select the BTP subaccount EU11. In case this is not available on SAP BTP for you, please contact your Account Executive or Customer Success Partner for support.

The same maintenance windows are needed (different time zones end up in longer total maintenance windows or limited availability for the E2E business process during each separate maintenance window).

Things to Consider for Joule Setup:

  • You can always follow our Joule roadmap here.
  • Line of Business solutions
    • Data center locations of the customer systems
    • Customer requirements on geographical locations
  • Available SAP Cloud Identity Services in your landscape (should have a common domain like *.ondemand.com or *.cloud.sap for unified setup)
  • Selecting the Joule Subaccount – SAP Business AI – Overview
  • Latency reference (for reference only) - SAP Business AI – Overview
  • Existing customers with a Joule activation in SAP SuccessFactors with system formation need to raise a ticket using the following component “CA-JOULE” to include or exclude a system in the Joule formation, for example, Joule for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, SAP Digital Supply Chain instances until further notification of the automated process. You can find the help page here.

Note: The above process is required, in case of including or excluding a system from Joule formation as we cannot re-run the Joule Booster

  • Joule Constraints – help page
  • Data Protection and Privacy – help page

Please stay tuned for our next blogs and videos on setting up Joule using a unified approach. 

 

 

Happy Learning!

Regards,
Nagesh Caparthy
SAP Business AI, RIG Team

entry.title: SAP Fiori - hide URL field on Zebra Scanner
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,
we are using chrome browser on our Zebra scanner to open our Fiori apps.
A lot of space is used by the URL field. Is there a way to use Fiori apps on full screen or is there a way to hide the URL field on the scanner?

Thanks in advance!

Best Regards, 
Shiv

entry.title: is there field for equipment number in P.R and P.O screen in MM
entry.content:
is there field for equipment number in P.R and P.O screen in MM 

My customer needs to have a reports for all purchased spare parts and services for an equipment 

Without the need to display P.M order to know the equipment

entry.title: Re: EWM x DM integration - PSA stock not read
entry.content:
Hi Hopsa,

I'm facing the same problem but even thought I've activated both Badis the message is not generated in the sistem.

Any suggestions?

entry.title: Re: RHEL 8.10 UPGRADE REQUIRED PROCESS
entry.content:
According to SAP note 2235581, only HANA 2.0 SP05 is supported on RHEL 7.

Because you will jump RHEL releases, the best option is to create a new machine with the RHEL 8.10, install SAP HANA, then do a backup/restore and finally install the Application Servers with the SWPM tool.

entry.title: PO Approval Workflow For Changes
entry.content:
As standard, when PO approval WF is turned on, user must go through WF. There is a requirement to trigger PO WF ONLY when certain changes(i.e. price, quantity change) happen on the PO, comparing to the initiating requisition. If there is no change, user just saves PO without triggering redundant WF.We have seen there is no such option in the flexible workflow configuration. Will SAP have a solution to this in any releases?


Another option is to stop user from editing the price/quantity in PO by using field selection but public cloud has a limitation. Need SAP’s advise if any options without going through enhancement.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: PO Approval Workflow For Changes
entry.content:
Dear user ,

For your questions you have respective BADI to get the requirements, 

The following KBAS have details, 

https://me.sap.com/notes/2841783/E

https://me.sap.com/notes/3268822/E

 

BADIS for field selection :

MM_PUR_S4_PR_FLDCNTRL_SIMPLE

MM_PUR_S4_PO_FLDCNTRL_SIMPLE

thanks for checking 

Maria Nunez

entry.title: Re: Batch number missing in LOIPRO Idoc under E1AFPOL
entry.content: In the LOIPRO data population I do not see any reference to CHARG, which would only leave the possibility that the data doesn't exist in AFPO or an implemented user-exit.

entry.title: Re: China bank coding - Set country-specific checks <OY17>
entry.content: Hi, you're not wrong on the overall understanding of the best practices. I just wanted to call out that I had the same issue with Mexico. Many EU countries use IBAN yes. We set up the check rule to '1' and the issue was resolved.

entry.title: Re: EWM x DM integration - PSA stock not read

entry.title: How can I create Credit Memo in Real Estate Management?
entry.content: Please, I would like to create Credit Memo in Real Estate?

entry.title: Do "address locks" occur for Data [pages] Only Locked (DOL) tables?
entry.content:
We've been having some deadlock problems where we get deadlock messages like this in the ASE server errorlog file (note the shared/exclusive address locks):

 

Deadlock Id 8827: Process (Familyid 0, Spid 278) was waiting for a 'shared address' lock at 0x0x7fbdda5ac978 
  but process (Familyid 0, Spid 730) already held a 'exclusive address' lock.
Deadlock Id 8827: Process (Familyid 0, Spid 730) was waiting for a 'exclusive page' lock on page 107591674 of table 'MyTable' , indid 4 in database 'MyDB' 
  but process (Familyid 0, Spid 278) already held a 'exclusive page' lock on it.

 

I don't remember hearing about "address locks" before.  Looking at the docs, I found statements like:

"SAP ASE acquires address locks on the index pages of allpages-locked tables. These locks block access to data pages"

"Address locks are held on index pages of allpages-locked tables. Address locks can have serious impact, since a lock on an index page blocks access to all data pages pointed to by the index page"

Interestingly, in the Types of Locks in SAP ASE doc pages, there's no mention address locks.  I couldn't find much in the "SAP for Me Knowledge [aka "notes"] Search"  either

Anyway, we're thinking about converting the table at issue from All pages locking to Data [pages] Only Locking (DOL).  The above comments seem to imply that "address locks" don't apply do DOL locked tables.  Is that true?   

It's not trivial to change the locking scheme for this table.  The "alter table" command will have to rewrite the whole table to change the locking type (ie., peak space usage of 2x).   This is a big and busy table, so we don't want to go to the trouble of changing to DOL locking if it won't help.

Thanks in advance
Ben

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration OData APIs - Way To Retrieve Persist Messages From Cloud Tenant
entry.content:
The Persist step stores data for 90 days by default.

The data store saves data for 30 days by default.

entry.title: Re: Output Management - Configurando o DANFE(Adobe Forms)
entry.content:
@adriano_baptista_seidor estou com o mesmo problema aqui no cliente, mas a impressão está dando DUMP.

vc conseguiu resolver?

entry.title: Re: PIR not shown as source of supply in Manage productio...
entry.content:
Hi 

It may happen to Manage Production order app also. Please might help you

1618359 - Conversion of planned order does not copy the info record

2953745 - Info record automatically filled when converting planned order to purchase requisition

We have a note it looks like it fulfil your requirements It is for ECC and all S/4 version Please check it may help 

ECC:

You have a material with no source list entries, and there is ONE info record available for a vendor. You run MRP and generate planned orders for an externally procured material. If you check the planned order source of supply, it is blank because there is no entry on the source list.

But, when you try to convert this planned order to purchase requisition, the vendor from the info record is automatically filled even if there is no source list entries.

S/4HANA:

You have a material externally procured. The ONLY source of supply available is an info record WITHOUT the "automatic sourcing" flag.

Then, you run MRP for this externally procured material, generating planned orders. If you check, no vendor was selected on the source of supply of the planned order.

But, when you try to convert this planned order to purchase requisition, the vendor from the info record is automatically filled even if it does not contain the "automatic sourcing" flag.

entry.title: Re: Call API returns code 500
entry.content: @amontella96 Thankyou for your comment. The owner of the service confirmed that the XML is valid.

entry.title: Re: What do the values 'AG, RG, RE, ZM' in OPD mean?
entry.content:
Please

  1. open your configuration environment, and in the Partner Determination configuration item (ID 500109),  check the partner functions and their names in one of the underlying configuration steps; for example in the configuration step 'Set Up Partner Determination for Sales Document Header' (ID 101288).
    • Open the Configuration Help or
    • Choose 'Configure' and open the 'Partner Functions' dialog structure.
      Please note that the two-digit partner function keys, listed under the 'Partner Functions' dialog structure, are dependant on the system logon language:
      • English:


      • German:
  2. refer to the SAP Help documentation for the partner functions typical for sales processing:
    • In English: 
      https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a376cd9ea00d476b96f18dea1247e6a5/0871bd534f22b44ce10000000a174cb4.html?version=latest
    • In German:
      https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a376cd9ea00d476b96f18dea1247e6a5/0871bd534f22b44ce10000000a174cb4.html?locale=de-DE&version=latest

entry.title: Re: Automatic Data Store cleanup using SAP API
entry.content:
Hi Arundhati,

very nice blog. I need one help. 

i tried opening https://tenantid-tmn.xxxxx.ondemand.com/api/v1/DataStores(DataStoreName='DS_Payloads',IntegrationFlow='',Type='')/Entries. on browser giving my tenant details. it is giving me 

<error xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata">
<code>Not Found</code>
<message xml:lang="en-US">Could not find an entity set or function import for 'DataStores'.</message>
</error>
 
please could you pls help to resolve the issue.
what is the response of this api?
 
Thanks,

entry.title: Re: In SAP screen personas, the about personas still show...

entry.title: Field "XXX" in table /1OM/ODM_OEIT_STR_300 is specified twice
entry.content:
After the last updated, the structure /1OM/ODM_OEIT_STR_300_B got some inconsistences, and it is as partly active.  when I checked the logs some of the fields specified twice.  Developing at Scale

I have been trying to remove the duplicated fields for several ways, but I haven't could it. It shows an error: 

I found this SAP Note 1624942 for unlock the structure I was trying to use this program Z_UNLOCK_R3TR_TABLE but it didn't work either. 

Any ideas?

entry.title: Automating Tax Reclamation with SAP Concur API
entry.content:
1. Introduction

This document outlines the use case for automating tax reclamation submissions using the SAP Concur API. By leveraging the /api/v3.0/taxes/reclamation endpoint with a POST request, organizations can significantly reduce administrative burden, accelerate tax refunds, and streamline processes in regions with complex tax reclaim procedures.

  1. Use Case

Many countries allow businesses to reclaim certain taxes, such as Value Added Tax (VAT) or Goods and Services Tax (GST), on eligible expenses. However, the process of submitting these claims can be time-consuming and error-prone when done manually. The SAP Concur API provides a solution to automate this process, offering several benefits:

  • Reduced administrative workload
  • Faster processing of tax refunds
  • Improved accuracy in submissions
  • Better compliance with local tax regulations
  • Real-time tracking of reclamation status
  1. Country-Specific Examples

3.1 United Kingdom (UK)

In the UK, businesses can reclaim VAT on many goods and services purchased for business use. The SAP Concur API can be used to automatically submit VAT reclamation forms to HM Revenue and Customs (HMRC).

3.2 Australia

Australian businesses can claim GST credits for eligible business purchases. The SAP Concur API can streamline the process of submitting Business Activity Statements (BAS) to the Australian Taxation Office (ATO).

  1. Implementation

To implement the tax reclamation automation, you'll need to make a POST request to the /api/v3.0/taxes/reclamation endpoint. Here's a sample code snippet in Python using the requests library:

import requests
import json

# Replace with your SAP Concur API credentials
api_url = "https://api.concursolutions.com/api/v3.0/taxes/reclamation"
access_token = "YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN"

# Sample data for UK VAT reclamation
uk_reclamation_data = {
    "country": "GB",
    "reclamationType": "VAT",
    "claimPeriodStart": "2023-01-01",
    "claimPeriodEnd": "2023-03-31",
    "totalReclaimAmount": 1000.00,
    "currency": "GBP",
    "expenses": [
        {
            "expenseId": "EXP12345",
            "reclaimAmount": 200.00,
            "taxRate": 20
        },
        # Add more expenses as needed
    ]
}

# Sample data for Australian GST reclamation
au_reclamation_data = {
    "country": "AU",
    "reclamationType": "GST",
    "claimPeriodStart": "2023-04-01",
    "claimPeriodEnd": "2023-06-30",
    "totalReclaimAmount": 1500.00,
    "currency": "AUD",
    "expenses": [
        {
            "expenseId": "EXP67890",
            "reclaimAmount": 100.00,
            "taxRate": 10
        },
        # Add more expenses as needed
    ]
}

headers = {
    "Authorization": f"Bearer {access_token}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json"
}

# Submit UK VAT reclamation
uk_response = requests.post(api_url, headers=headers, data=json.dumps(uk_reclamation_data))
print(f"UK VAT Reclamation Status: {uk_response.status_code}")
print(f"UK VAT Reclamation Response: {uk_response.json()}")

# Submit Australian GST reclamation
au_response = requests.post(api_url, headers=headers, data=json.dumps(au_reclamation_data))
print(f"Australian GST Reclamation Status: {au_response.status_code}")
print(f"Australian GST Reclamation Response: {au_response.json()}")
  • Conclusion

By leveraging the SAP Concur API for tax reclamation, organizations can significantly improve their financial processes, ensure compliance, and accelerate tax refunds. This automation is particularly valuable for businesses operating in countries with complex tax reclaim procedures, such as the UK and Australia.

For more information on implementing this solution or for assistance with other SAP Concur API integrations, please refer to the official SAP Concur API documentation or contact SAP support.

entry.title: Re: [SAP BTP Onboarding Series] Joule – Getting Started with Joule and SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content: Good morning, we already had the standard plan enabled for Workzone Standard, does this affect anything?

entry.title: XSLT Transformation and standard text for ROUTING_CREATE
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I've the following question about a XSLT Transformation to manage an XML incoming file into an Idoc for the ROUTING_CREATE for what concerns standard texts for operation.

The XML is something like this:

 

 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<MaterialRouting xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema">
  <Operations>
    <WorkingCycleOperation>
      <OperationNote>Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea commodo consequat.</OperationNote>
    </WorkingCycleOperation>
  </Operations>
</MaterialRouting>

 

meaning that the text inside the <OperationNote> tag shall be transformed as a standard text

to be inserted into the ROUTING_CREATE Idoc segments for the relevant routing operation, here:

 

Thank you for any help on this.

With best regards,

JF

entry.title: Re: How to define the Business Place
entry.content:
Hi, Go to below path and define the business place:-

SPRO > Cross-Application Components > General Application Functions > Business Place > Define Business Places

Regards,

entry.title: SOLMAN 7.2 software required for new installation
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am new to installing SAP Solution Manager 7.2 and would appreciate your guidance on the necessary software and steps to begin the installation process.

Application: SAP Solution Manager 7.2
Database: DB2 LUW 11.5
Operating System: AIX 7.3

Could you please recommend the required installation packages and any additional resources I should review to get started with the installation?

Thank you in advance for your support!

Best regards,
Maladri

entry.title: Re: Error Importing content in SAP Build Work Zone - SAP...
entry.content:
Hi @dennis_koehler,

Thank you for your time.

Regarding the two points:

  1. The content was created, but it doesn’t have any role or other objects internally.

  2. When I call the URL configured in the Design Time destination, although it responds, it doesn’t return any objects.

    The same happens when I call version 2 of the Service.

    Here is how I have the communication arrangement configured.


    As for the steps to expose the content, these are the ones I am following.




Thanks again!

entry.title: Re: Defaulting to the legacy home page - H2 2024 (New Lea...
entry.content: Can you clarify your comment?

entry.title: Re: Binding transfer problem
entry.content: I am not sure I am following the flow here. You have an Object Table with OnPress event calling a popover menu where the first rule is called?

entry.title: Re: What do the values 'AG, RG, RE, ZM' in OPD mean?
entry.content:
Please see below the explanation to the configuration step 'Set Up Partner Determination for Sales Document Header' (ID 101288):

You can convert the keys, that identify the partner functions in the original German system, to language-specific keys. The converted keys then appear according to the language in which the user logs on to to system.

If you work with multiple languages in your system, you must define language-dependent keys for the partner functions. For example, for the ship-to party, whose SAP key (internal key, in German) is "WE", you can define "SH" as the English key. As a result, the system shows "SH" for the ship-to party partner function when the system logon language is English.
For more information please see the SAP Help documentation Partner Control in Master Records and Documents.

Please refer to the Partner Function Conversion dialog structure for the respective partner function keys in your system.
The 'Partn. Funct.' column shows the SAP internal two-digits partner keys.
The 'Partn.Funct. (Language-specific)' column lists the language specific partner keys defined for the specific logon language in the column 'Language'.

  • English

  • German:

The 'Output Parameter Determination' app uses the two-digits SAP internal partner function keys.

entry.title: Sending email to individuals based on specific calendar dates
entry.content:
We would like to send emails to employees to let them know their pay statement is available in the MY PAY STATEMENT TILE. The email should be sent based on a specific payroll deposit calendar.

What is the best way to do this in EC? or CPI?

entry.title: Year End Tax Forms output into a file with individual PDF
entry.content: When running employee's year end tax forms in ECP, we would like to be able to group individual's tax forms in PDF format into a ZIP file.

entry.title: SAP systemcopy - Public and private views in fiori app copied too or lost?
entry.content:
Hi SAP community,

Do public and private views created by our SAP users in Fiori Apps get copied too when a SAP systemcopy is perfomed?
Or are the views in the Fiori apps lost after the systemcopy?

 

Best regards,
Joyce Len

entry.title: Re: PO date in MB5T report
entry.content: Hello, sorry, the link??

entry.title: Re: error in cl_sxml_string_writer, sXML Library
entry.content: We still have that problem, at 2024-07-31 you wrote, you will discuss it with your colleagues.

entry.title: Re: People Analitycs - Issue with loading story reports
entry.content:
That sounds a lot like what happens when the user trying to access stories wasn't loaded into SAC by IPS. You can verify this in the check tool in admin center. Its under the validation sub header

 

You can access stories via proxy because story reporting doesn't respect proxy. You are effectively logging in as yourself even in proxy

entry.title: Configuring reciever port for outbound IDOC
entry.content:
Hello all,

Here I am facing with an issue about outbound IDOC's. Our customer has copied their P system to Q. After that some configurations were done for rfcs,idocs etc. But currently IDOCS are not working. 

I got a general error message when i checked we02 

''IDoc could not be processed without errors''

I have digged a little bit and find out the reciever port was not determined properly.

On Q, I got this ( please see the attached image) but normally it should be A00000X. I have already checked we20 and we21. everything looks same as P system.

Can someone help me about this issue?

entry.title: Re: Inbound Process Putaway by Warehouse Order using RFUI
entry.content: Thanks for the detailed document. Kindly change the transaction to /SCWM/PRDI and Warehouse Number to Warehouse Order.

entry.title: Re: SAP CDP delete customers
entry.content: Good day, I can argue- Data Retention provides the ability to delete profiles after a set time period

entry.title: Re: How do I reset RSMDATASTATE after a load to a Datamar...
entry.content: The cube and load mechanisms that were decommissioned were deleted from the system, thus leaving a void.

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable Now library link opens in new window
entry.content:
Hi Joke,

I'm not certain but the first behaviour that you mention, i.e. the content opening in a second window on start up of a library, however, I suspect that the first window is authenticating the user and the second contains the content.  The second behaviour that you mention is correct.  If you link from a landing page to a Simulation and choose not to open the Simulation in a new window, it opens the Simulation in a virtual tab.  Refer to the image below.

 The number 2 in the top, right corner of the image indicates that the content is open in a second virtual tab.  If the user closes the virtual tab using the X, the original library is redisplayed.

Hope that helps.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: how to add multiple report in one report during run time
entry.content:
Difficult to provide a good response without a clear sense of the data model.
 If a single table you can simply get the data as multiple records. Otherwise, here are a few options:

Use a view/stored procedure/command to UNION the results into a single record set.
Use Subreports, suppressing blank ones.
Use multiple detail sections (Detail a, Detail b, ...) and sql expressions, with conditional suppress expressions.

entry.title: Re: Call API returns code 500
entry.content:
Sounds like you are missing a SOAPAction header, so the receiving system is unable to identify which action to take.

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: Re: Dropdown List in Fiori Elements
entry.content: Great! That solved my problem!

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to prolong the starter system in S/4HA...
entry.content:
Hello,

Your Starter System will be taken away three months after the production system provisioning. However, if you want to keep the Starter System beyond that, it is around $500 per month. Talk to your Account Executive to get a firm price.

Regards,

George

entry.title: Handling Units not assigned in inspection lot
entry.content:
Hi,

A company with multiple branches across different countries uses SAP. One branch of the company conducted a shipment to another branch in a different country by sending goods in specific quantities, with each pallet containing a handling unit, using an outbound delivery to transfer the goods to the receiving branch.

Upon receiving these goods, the receiving branch processed a goods receipt for the inbound delivery. However, they deleted the handling units sent by the other branch, which then went to storage location 9000. The receiving branch (Branch B) then created new handling units, but these new units do not appear in the sampling report and also do not show up in the inspection lot.

entry.title: JCo initialization failed with java.lang.UnsatisfiedLinkError: no sapjco3
entry.content:
Upgraded from 2211.21 to 2211.24.

When I do a build on my local,

  • MacBook Pro,
  • Sonoma 14.7.1,
  • OpenJDK 64-Bit Server VM SapMachine (build 17.0.13+11-LTS, mixed mode, sharing)

I get the message:

no sapjco3 in java.library.path: /Users/david/Library/Java/Extensions:/Library/Java/Extensions:/Network/Library/Java/Extensions:/System/Library/Java/Extensions:/usr/lib/java:

I have placed the jar file into:

  • /Users/david/Library/Java/Extensions
  • /Library/Java/Extensions

I also followed https://me.sap.com/notes/0003415747, but still no luck I continue to get this error.  

What am I doing incorrect here and why has this become an issue now.

entry.title: Learning Room for SAP ASUE Training Program
entry.content:
Welcome to the ASUE SAP Training Program Learning Room!

This space is dedicated to students participating in the SAP training program at ASUE. Here, you can:

  • 🗨️ Post your questions about the training material.
  • 💡Share your feedback to help us improve the learning experience.
  • 🤝Engage with peers and instructors to deepen your understanding of the SAP ecosystem.

Let’s make this a collaborative and enriching learning environment!

Feel free to start a discussion or ask for help anytime. 🚀

entry.title: Re: Binding transfer problem
entry.content:
Hi Bill,

I made a mistake in the explanation.

It isn't an ObjectTable but a DataTable(the customer need a more data to show in columns).

Unfortunately the DataTable does not have actions like ObjectTable(ex.: swipe actions) than when I click on a Sales Order a new modal page appears where through buttons you can choose to Show Details, Copy, Reject sales order.

When I click Show Details button, the first rule was called, than the Fetch Rule and finally the NavToShowSalesOrder execute action.

The detail page have empty header data fields because the binding is empty.

I need to know how to transfer the binding of DataTable row press to detail page.

I tried setActionBinding just before NavToShowSalesOrder but it seems to not work.

Thanks.

entry.title: Descuentos por pronto pago Inactiva
entry.content:
Hola,

En nuestra empresa hemos acordado aplicar descuentos por pronto pago a proveedores para compras recurrentes. Al intentar configurar estas condiciones de pago y parametrizar los descuentos, nos dimos cuenta de que la opción no está disponible en el sistema.

Nos comunicamos con nuestro partner y nos informaron que esta funcionalidad está disponible solo para regiones específicas. Sin embargo, nos mencionaron que si deseamos implementar esta opción, sería necesario desarrollar una solución personalizada.

Mi duda es si realmente es necesario este desarrollo, ya que al revisar la base de datos, encontramos que sí tenemos acceso a la tabla correspondiente

Adjunto una imagen de referencia para que puedan tener una mejor idea de lo que estamos viendo.

Hola,

En nuestra empresa hemos acordado aplicar descuentos por pronto pago a proveedores para compras recurrentes. Al intentar configurar estas condiciones de pago y parametrizar los descuentos, nos dimos cuenta de que la opción no está disponible en el sistema.

Nos comunicamos con nuestro partner y nos informaron que esta funcionalidad está disponible solo para regiones específicas. Sin embargo, nos mencionaron que si deseamos implementar esta opción, sería necesario desarrollar una solución personalizada.

Mi duda es si realmente es necesario este desarrollo, ya que al revisar la base de datos, encontramos que sí tenemos acceso a la tabla correspondiente

Adjunto una imagen de referencia para que puedan tener una mejor idea de lo que estamos viendo.

Imagen con la opción activada

   Imagen con la opción desactivada

Agradezco cualquier ayuda o sugerencia sobre cómo proceder.

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite Test Connectivity to SAP Ariba - How to get Host URL
entry.content:
Hello Experts ..

We tried to Integrate SAP Ariba to ServiceNow using SAP BTP Integration Suite.

As a first step, trying to connect SAP BTP Integration Suite to SAP Ariba thru "Connectivity Tests".

Question: How do we get Host url of SAP Ariba?

We tried with https://S1.Ariba.com etc.. but getting "Couldn't connect to Hot".

Could you please help.

entry.title: Re: FIORI Elements Id and Text annotation does not work i...
entry.content:
The reason is that the text field (Parnr) isn't being requested in the GET call of your table. You need to include is in the RequestAtLeast columns (which I haven't figured out how yet). 

To try this theory, add the text field field Parnr to the table, you'll see that your original column Parvw will correctly display the text as well.

entry.title: Re: On what makes a great frontend framework and why UI5 is one
entry.content:
Great article, Nico. I really like the premise of "Getting things done, fast. And make them last." 
Combine this with CAP and the BTP platform capabilities, and you have a very powerful tandem to bring value from the start and grow as you go.

entry.title: Re: Custom Learning LxP Integration with SAP SuccessFactors LMS
entry.content:
This is a nice article, but in my experience integrating an LxP with an LMS (such as EdCast to an LMS), one critical element missing here is learning plan integration. Without this, SF LMS functions more as a database without leveraging its LMS capabilities. Learning plan integration can be particularly challenging for two reasons: (1) there are no APIs available, so custom reports must be created for this purpose, and (2) differentiating between training and retraining can be complex to implement in PRD SQL.

Overall, a good article.

entry.title: Re: CDS view with Change Data Capture(CDC) for Replication Flow – Part 1
entry.content:
Hi @BenedictV ,

Yes, when there's a join in CDS view, we have to use the Table Mapping for CDC so that the changes to the left table are captured as part of delta.

Regards,

Sayani

entry.title: Re: How to stop the Zero amount settlement document again...
entry.content:
Hi Pankaj,

what did you do to solve this issue?

Thanks,
Fauzi

entry.title: Re: How to create the dynamic flow for approvers in process automation
entry.content: I'm having similar requirements. Is there solution for this?

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Integration (CPI) - JDBC Adapter - Step-by-step guide - Pre-requisites and Configurati
entry.content:
I found work around on this. You may follow the guide below

Execute Batch Payload Operations Using Java Database Connectivity (JDBC) Receiver Adapter | SAP Tutorials

Atomic Batch operation with groovy script.

So far I able to insert 400k records with each batch 2k record using the method mentioned above.

The guide provided in the blog here is misleading, you will never be able to put multiple SQL insert statements in the payload that accepted by JDBC adapter. 

And also XML payload is not suitable for bulk insert, it is very slow and having constant error returned from database after executing for more than 30 minutes

entry.title: Re: CDS Annotations: How to not display a field on the List Report Column but keep then on the OData
Migration of Interview Scheduling using Microsoft Outlook Integration to Work Tech
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I hope you're all doing well.

I’ve recently reviewed the new enhancement, RCM-119380 – Migration of Interview Scheduling using Microsoft Outlook Integration to Work Tech. I am currently working on this integration, but we’ve encountered some challenges during the implementation process.

One question we have concerns the setup. If we implement the integration in production using the Interview Scheduling Outlook Integration instead of the Work Tech Configuration, will we need to perform any additional steps after the 1H 2025 release? Should we instead move forward with the integration directly via Work Tech to ensure long-term stability?

Additionally, we are considering testing the configuration in the preview environment, even though the credentials will remain the same. Would this be advisable, or are there any risks to testing in this way?

I’d appreciate any insights or advice from experts who have worked with this integration or have experience with the upcoming changes in 1H 2025.

Thank you in advance for your help!

entry.title: Re: VBA & SAP GUI Script Error "619": Control Could Not Be Found by ID
entry.content: Can you help me?, I Have the same problem. How you resolved it.

entry.title: Re: Dynamic filter using apply_filter throws an error?
entry.content: Fixed by passing the values in single quote

entry.title: Digital Skills Initiative
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to ensure that I can apply for FREE SAP Certification if I finish one of the learning journeys before 1 Dec 2024. I am a women, left IT career few years back and want to resume it again. Do I need to apply anywhere for availing it? I have SAP Universal ID and started studying for completing a learning journey. 

Regs,

Tripti

entry.title: 2H 2024: Enhancing the Candidate Experience with Embedded AI in SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting
entry.content:
With the 2H 2024 release, we have delivered new AI-driven capabilities within SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting to improve the candidate experience and accelerate skills-based hiring.

Through customer influence on the Customer Community and innovative product enhancements, we are bringing your ideas to life and driving improvements across the recruiting experience.

To learn more watch the on-demand Q&A webinar: 2H 2024 Product Release Webinars.

All of the 2H 2024 release items can be found on the What’s New Viewer. These new features will be live in Production on November 17th, 2024.

Now, explore a preview of the top highlights in SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting to get excited about in 2H 2024: 

AI-Assisted Job Recommendations

With this release, candidates can now use AI to discover jobs that match the skills they have, enabling them to find and apply for the right opportunities for them. When candidates upload their resumes to the career site, AI extracts their skills, allowing candidates to discover open roles that match their skills.

Allowing candidates to participate in skills-based hiring helps drive adoption, improve talent pools, and encourage valuable talent to find the right opportunities for them. Candidates can view, validate, and modify AI-extracted skills, enabling them to have control over the skills-based job recommendations, driving them to the most relevant opportunities for them.

Candidates can view AI-driven job recommendations based on the skills extracted from their resume, aligned to skills needed for various roles. This encourages candidates to consider more opportunities that align to their skills.

AI-Assisted Job Skills on Career Site

When candidates find a role they are interested in, they can view the job details page, which now shows AI-assisted job skills and provides insights into matching and missing skills. The AI-assisted skills cloud on job details pages gives candidates a clear view into the skills needed for a role, enabling them to apply for roles that best fit their skill set.

Simplified Candidate Authentication

As part of an ongoing initiative to deliver a simplified candidate experience, external candidate authentication enables applicants to create a profile and apply for a role with a phone number or social account login, instead of an email address. Candidates can complete the application process more easily and benefit from an improved user experience as familiar as their favorite sites. Candidates can begin applying for a role by simply registering with a social account or text login. These enhancements help deliver a quick, mobile-first experience to secure interested candidates, reducing candidate drop-off, accelerating time to apply, and improving the overall candidate experience for deskless applicants.

Delivering Enhancements to the Recruiter Experience   

With each release, we continue to deliver enhancements to the redesigned applicant management tool, providing recruiters with sophisticated tools and AI-driven capabilities to quickly screen, manage, and hire applicants. With this release, we have enhanced the AI-assisted skills matching feature to let you view the total number of skills in an applicant’s resume that match the skills specified as primary or secondary on the job description. This enhancement helps recruiters and hiring managers utilize the skills compatibility insights to make informed decisions during applicant screening and hiring.

Continuous upcoming enhancements to the applicant management tool will be delivered with each release, ensuring key functionality is available to customers ahead of the depreciation timeline of the legacy applicant workbench tool planned for 2026.

Additionally, for recruiting postings, we continue to extend the list of job board integrations available in the job board marketplace to fulfill continuous recruitment needs regionally.

With every release, we are excited to deliver these new innovations and continue our journey of providing even greater value to our SAP SuccessFactors customers. For full details, please check out the 2H 2024 Release Highlights Resources: 

  • 2H 2024 Release Highlights Brochure 
  • 2H 2024 Release Highlights Video 
  • Product Release & Road Map Information 

Learn more about SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting. 

SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting

entry.title: Re: 1H 2024 Release Highlights: Leveraging AI within SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting to Accelerate Hir
entry.content: Interested in the latest about SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting? Explore the 2H 2024 Release Highlights!

entry.title: Issue with Loading/Creating Story Reports in Non-Production Instances
entry.content:
Hi,

Several users, including myself, have encountered an issue when trying to create or load a Story report in non-production instances. The report gets stuck in an indefinite loading state.

I’ve tried the following troubleshooting steps:

  • Used different browsers
  • Cleared caches and cookies
  • Proxied through other users who have access to the Story report

Despite these efforts, the issue persists. However, I was able to successfully create and load the Story report in the production instance without any problems.

Has anyone else experienced this issue? If so, were you able to find a solution?

Thanks in advance for your help!

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Deplyoment Standalone App
entry.content: Same error, but I fail to see any answer

entry.title: Código promocional Roo bet: NEWUSD (bono de registro para noviembre de 2024)
entry.content:
¿Qué es el código promocional de Roo bet?

El código promocional de Roo bet para noviembre de 2024 es "NEWUSD", que ofrece: 20 % de reembolso en pérdidas durante los primeros 7 días de juego, sujeto al cumplimiento de los requisitos de apuesta.

Un ódigo promocional de Roo bet es un código alfanumérico especial que los jugadores nuevos y existentes pueden usar para desbloquear bonos exclusivos, como apuestas gratuitas, reembolsos u otras recompensas, en la plataforma de Roo bet. Estos códigos promocionales generalmente se ofrecen durante promociones específicas, bonos de bienvenida u ofertas de temporada.

¿Cómo usar un código promocional en Roo bet?

Para usar un código promocional en Roo bet:

  1. Inicie sesión en su cuenta.
  2. Vaya a la sección Promociones.
  3. Ingrese el código promocional de Roo bet "NEWUSD".
  4. Active el código y cumpla con los requisitos de apuesta para reclamar su bono.

entry.title: Roo bet Promosyon Kodu: NEWUSD (Kasım 2024 Kayıt Bonusu)
entry.content:
Roo bet Promosyon Kodu nedir?

Kasım 2024 için Roo bet promosyon kodu "NEWUSD" olup şunları sunar: Bahis gereksinimlerini karşılamaya tabi olarak, oyunun ilk 7 günü içinde kayıplarda %20 geri ödeme.

Roo bet promosyon kodu, yeni ve mevcut oyuncuların Roo bet platformunda ücretsiz bahisler, geri ödeme veya diğer ödüller gibi özel bonusların kilidini açmak için kullanabilecekleri özel bir alfanümerik koddur. Bu promosyon kodları genellikle belirli promosyonlar, hoş geldin bonusları veya sezonluk teklifler sırasında sunulur.

Roo bet'te Promosyon Kodu Nasıl Kullanılır?

Roo bet'te promosyon kodu kullanmak için:

  1. Hesabınıza giriş yapın.
  2. Promosyonlar bölümüne gidin.
  3. Roo bet promosyon kodu "NEWUSD"yi girin.
  4. Kodu etkinleştirin ve bonusunuzu talep etmek için herhangi bir bahis gereksinimini izleyin.

entry.title: Re: How to make Custom fields mandatory in S4 Hana Cloud?
entry.content: It is a case of Public CLoud, TCode is not accessible.

entry.title: Re: How to make Custom fields mandatory in S4 Hana Cloud?
entry.content: It does not take effect on the Fiori APP.

entry.title: How to Activate Retention Process with PO in sap s4 hana public cloud?
entry.content:
How to Activate Retention Process with PO in sap S/4HANA public cloud? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to Activate Retention Process with PO in sap s4 h...
entry.content:
In the purchase order, you define a retention as a percentage of the purchase order value at header or item level. The system calculates the retention for an invoice item based on this percentage, and proposes the retention amount that it calculates in this way when you enter the invoice. You can overwrite all default values for the retention amount in the invoice.

Please refer to this online documentation for detailed information:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0e602d466b99490187fcbb30d1dc897c/676fb6531de6b64ce10000000a174cb4.html?locale=en-US

Also please refer to this blog about the retention process:
https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/retention-process-configuration-its-process-flow/ba-p/13524615

entry.title: Re: How to make Custom field added from Custom fields and logic app non editable/read only/display o
entry.content: Hi, have you found the solution yet? I also have same requirement

entry.title: 自動支払処理で源泉徴収税の自動計算がされない
entry.content:
こんにちは

①債務計上（FB60）→②自動支払処理（F110）にて、

伝票は選択されるものの、源泉徴収税が自動計算されない事態が発生しています。

（マニュアル支払（F-25）では問題なかったのですが、なぜか自動支払処理ではうまくいかないのです。）

entry.title: Re: Profit center in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi @ErikVH 

There is no ability to deactivate use of Profit Centers in S/4HANA Cloud Public. 

However you can minimize the maintenance by only defining a single PC and assigning to all records.

SAP recommends use of PCs to provide additional breakdown of Balance Sheet, for margin reporting and to provide a view across a range of cost object types such as Cost Centers, Projects and Orders.

regards

Mike

entry.title: Cód Promo Roo bet: NEWUSD (Cláraigh Bónas do mhí na Samhna 2024)
entry.content:
Cad é Cód Promo Roo bet?

Is é cód promo Roo bet do mhí na Samhna 2024 ná "NEWUSD", a thairgeann: aisíocaíocht 20% ar chaillteanais laistigh den chéad 7 lá súgartha, faoi réir na gceanglas geallchur a chomhlíonadh.

Is cód alfa-uimhriúil speisialta é cód promo Roo bet is féidir le himreoirí nua agus atá ann cheana féin a úsáid chun bónais eisiacha a dhíghlasáil, mar shampla geallta saor in aisce, airgead ar ais, nó luach saothair eile, ar ardán geall Roo. Is gnách go dtairgtear na cóid promo seo le linn promóisin shonracha, bónais fáilte, nó tairiscintí séasúracha.


Conas Cód Promo a Úsáid ar Roo bet?

Chun cód promo a úsáid ar Roo bet:

  1. Logáil isteach i do chuntas.
  2. Déan nascleanúint go dtí an rannán Arduithe Céime.
  3. Cuir isteach an cód promo Roo bet "NEWUSD".
  4. Gníomhachtaigh an cód agus lean aon riachtanais geallchur chun do bhónas a éileamh.

entry.title: Withholding tax issue on Auto Payment
entry.content:
Hi, I'm now facing the problem of "Withholding tax has not calculated in auto payment program".

I posted the supplier document in FB60 then wanted to pay on auto payment program but withholding tax has not calculate automatically.

It was work on manual payment on F-25. Why it doesn't work in auto? 

Tell me if you have some idea or answer. 

Best Regards,

entry.title: Second Half 2024 Release: What’s New in SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Global Benefits?
entry.content:
The Second Half 2024 Release is here! I wanted to take just a couple of minutes to share with you some exciting news about SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Global Benefits.

As you may already know, the First Half 2024 Release introduced a new guided benefits enrollment experience to help simplify and streamline the experience for employees. Met with excitement by existing customers eager to adopt the new experience, and described as a game-changer by those evaluating SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Global Benefits, the refreshed enrollment experience makes benefits enrollment more seamless, simple and intuitive for employees.

However, we didn’t stop there! Building upon the user experience enhancements in our First Half 2024 Release, we continue to enhance the global benefits experience to make it easier for employees to enroll in and manage their benefits.

Refreshed Benefits Overview Page                                                                                                                 With the Second Half 2024 Release, we are excited to introduce a refreshed benefits overview page for insurance, savings, and pension benefit types. This new experience, available on desktop and mobile devices, provides employes with a single place to view their benefits details and take action such as declaring a life event, managing their beneficiaries, or enrolling in benefits. And, with convenient access from the ‘Manage My Benefits’ quick action card on the home page, the benefits overview enables employees to easily find a summary of their enrolled benefits, view their confirmation statement, and see available benefits.

Refreshed Benefits Overview Page (Desktop)

The updated Benefits Overview page consolidates benefits activities that were previously distributed across the employee profile and legacy benefits overview. As part of the SAP SuccessFactors Mobile application, the new benefits overview provides employees access to all the features of the desktop experience from the convenience of their mobile devices.

Refreshed Benefits Overview Page (Mobile)

Benefits Engagement Cards                                                                                                                                  In addition, we’ve further improved the benefits experience with new engagement cards to notify employees of time sensitive benefits-related tasks such as benefits enrollment windows for new hires, rehires and open enrollment. With a countdown of days remaining in the enrollment windows, these new engagement cards prompt employees to take action with simplified navigation to the enrollment process directly from the home page. 

Benefits Engagement Cards on the SAP SuccessFactors Homepage

But that’s not all… access the What’s new viewer to learn about all the innovations available in SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Global Benefits with the Second Half 2024 Release.

For More Information                                                                                                                                          To learn about all the enhancements and innovations available across the SAP SuccessFactors HCM suite in the SAP SuccessFactors Second Half 2024 Release, check out the resources below:

  • Read the 2H 2024 Release Highlights Brochure
  • Watch the 2H 2024 Release Highlights Video, featuring Bianka Woelke, GVP Head of Application Product Management
  • Visit the SAP SuccessFactors Community for release documentation, product videos, and solution area blogs

entry.title: Re: WAVE RELEASE based on DELIVERY CREATION DATE or PLANN...
entry.content: Hi @JuergenPitz, thanks a lot for your explanation, I am checking the key points your highlighted.

entry.title: Re: SAC Data Action Advanced Formula - Copy Actual of Las...
entry.content:
Hi @SyedShoaib 

First, set the external parameter to get the Last updated month as shown in the screenshot below,

Second, set the Planning period for the Plan Version in the Version Property "Start" & "End",

- The Planning period value should be in Date format (YYYYMM: 202412) for Start & End.

- Start property & value is not mandatory.

 

The Advanced Formulas Script to get your expected result,

 

MEMBERSET [d/Date] = NEXT(1, "MONTH", %Last_Updated_Month%) TO [d/Version].[p/End]

DATA() = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version]="public.Actual", [d/Date]=%Last_Updated_Month%)

 

 

I hope this is helpful to you, and if I have misunderstood anything, please feel free to reach out.

Moonjun

entry.title: Re: WAVE RELEASE based on DELIVERY CREATION DATE or PLANN...
entry.content: Hi @JuergenPitz, can you please help me with any BADI or any exit available in EWM using which we can enhance the wave release criteria to fulfil customer requirement. I mean to achieve the wave release based on Delivery creation date or Planned ship date.

entry.title: Re: batch upload data from excel file to custom CDS table
entry.content: Thanks for your apply.

entry.title: Re: batch upload data from excel file to custom CDS table
entry.content: This requires the use of the BTP platform. Is there a simpler way, such as publishing CDS as an external writable API and calling it from Excel?

entry.title: Re: SAP systemcopy - Public and private views in fiori ap...
entry.content:
hi  joyce_len

all my bets are on: yes, in a system copy, all views are copied exactly as per source! cheers

entry.title: Re: batch upload data from excel file to custom CDS table
entry.content: you can do the same in your s4 hana cloud public system, no need for btp abap system.

entry.title: Re: batch upload data from excel file to custom CDS table
entry.content: you just have to define the table, the rest are all auto generated.
